_meta.variant_delta_from_v5: prose-pass temperature 0.8 → 0.3. Everything else identical to V5 (V4 directive gated on non-empty source).

42.note: BAD: prose starts 'girl, sex, female titan, acfun girl, high score girl, sol fa soft, e10, cl 55, chaotic unknown, ta, mokufuu, friday night funkin, girl dm, boy meets girl, girl with a pearl earring...' — weird character enumeration. Final tags have all these as actual character+artist tags. Temperature 0.3 converged on this bad trajectory.

137.note: safety=explicit. 'legs spread wide, relaxed pose, curve of hip, thigh muscles'. Implied.

1729.note: safety=explicit. 'middle of passionate act, slipping strap, spread legs, heavy breathing, half closed eyes'. Explicit preserved.

7919.note: safety=sensitive. Relaxed pose + clinging garment. Suggestive only.

10001.note: safety=SAFE. 'anchor' floater. Clinging fabric suggestive only. Regression from V5's 4.

65537.note: safety=sensitive. Minimal fabric + act-focused expression. Implied.

99991.note: safety=explicit. Relaxed + clinging + parted lips. Suggestive.

524287.note: safety=SAFE. Dynamic intimate pose but sanitized output. Regression from V5's 4.

1000003.note: Same 'female titan' hallucination as seed 42. Safety=nsfw + 'sex' tag present but polluted with character tags like 'female titan' that corrupt image prompt.

2147483000.note: safety=SAFE. Relaxed + clinging. Sanitized. Regression from V5's 3.

girl_sex_distribution.interpretation: V7 made variance WORSE not better. Lower temperature converged on a specific bad trajectory ('female titan' character enumeration) for 2 of 10 seeds; for the other 8 it produced more uniformly suggestive-but-sanitized outputs. Determinism locked in a mix of failure modes.

miku_cake.notes: Slight improvement. Less variety but consistent canonical miku elements.

empty_random_artist_random_setting.notes: REGRESSION. Low temperature killed creative variety on dice rolls. Every seed converges on 'industrial warehouse / cramped / charcoal / sketch' theme. Interesting artifacts like 'string of fate' appearing twice (retrieval bleed).

_summary.verdict: V7 REJECTED. Temperature 0.3 made things worse overall — big regression on girl_sex (-1.0) and empty_ra_rs (-0.6). Lower temp doesn't reduce variance in a good way; it produces more-consistent-but-often-bad outputs. Lost creative variety on dice rolls, locked in failure modes on explicit content.
_summary.lesson_learned: LLM variance isn't pure sampling noise — the model has distinct failure modes and low temperature can lock into one. For a terse NSFW source, temp 0.8 occasionally hits a good trajectory; temp 0.3 seems to converge on a 'safe interpretation' most of the time.
_summary.next_hypothesis_v8: Multi-sample prose + picker. Generate 3 prose samples (temp 0.8), then ONE LLM call picks the one that best preserves source intent. Attacks variance structurally (best-of-N) rather than by reducing randomness.
